name: Nitrokey
description: Nitrokey — open source hardware security keys and HSMs for secrets, SSH, and certificates.

seo.title: Nitrokey — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Nitrokey: Nitrokey — open source hardware security keys and HSMs for secrets, SSH, and certificates.

when_to_use: Hardware SSH key storage for developer privileged access
OpenPGP smart card for encrypted email and code signing
FIDO2/U2F security key for phishing-resistant MFA
HSM for small-team PKI and certificate signing workflows
Air-gapped secret storage for high-security environments

pros: Open-source hardware for keys and HSM
cons: HSM models carry steep learning curve
review.verdict: Top choice if you want open, auditable hardware keys; YubiKey still wins on polish.
review.best_for: Privacy-conscious devs and EU orgs needing auditable key hardware.
review.not_for: Teams prioritizing mainstream software compatibility over openness.
